ūüďĆ

Hey Product Hunt! ūüĎč I built Topolines to solve a recurring friction in my own design workflow: generating clean, vector-based topographic contour maps without opening heavy 3D software or manual vector tools. With Topolines, you can dynamically tweak elevation density, noise, line weights, and colors, then export clean SVG or HD PNG files ready for Figma, web projects, or print. Give it a try and let me know what you think! I'm around all day to answer your questions and take feature requests. ūüôĆ

results.title: GENERATE Definition & Meaning - Merriam-Webster
results.content:
transitive verb

: to bring into existence: such as

a

: procreate, beget

b

: to create by means of a defined process : produce

generate electricity

generating profits/growth

images generated by a computer

2

: to be the cause of (a situation, action, or state of mind)

These stories ‚Ä¶ generate a good deal of psychological suspense ‚Ä¶‚ÄĒAtlantic

3

: to define or originate (something, such as a mathematical or linguistic set or structure) by the application of one or more rules or operations

especially
: to trace out (something, such as a curve) by a moving point or to trace out (a surface) by a moving curve

## Synonyms of generate
